texto: And as for myself, I tell you, I have had too much luck these last years. Do you believe that a man's luck can run forever? I know that it can't. For myself, I must somehow erect a bulwark against the ill fortune that is certain.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Gontran De Poncins que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “And as for myself, I tell you, I have had too much luck these last years. Do you believe that a m…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, luck, myself, com foco em reflexao.
